All right, welcome back to the DMV down sale. I just wanted to give you a quick rundown on two different examples we used out in the wild. So the first one is for a splintered part of the program. This one was sent out for Dan Martel's idea to exit program a few years back, and it was sent immediately after the main launch concluded. So subject lines, the number one reason why everyone should start a tech company, 90% off, get the most transformative model from idea to exit. So this is the most direct or literal subject line of what we are offering them in the down sale. And it goes like this, entrepreneurship is the ultimate form of personal development. It acts like a forcing function to improve your thinking, to challenge your current circumstances, to set big ambitious goals, and to evolve into the type of person who can achieve them. We hear so much about how entrepreneurship transforms lives, and in some cases even saves them. But without the proper tools or frameworks, it's hard to accept the statement as anything more than fluffy quote card material. Well, that changes today. As you know, I recently closed the doors to my flagship course idea to exit. It would have been great to serve you there. So this is where we just bring that to immediate attention and trigger a bit of that feeling of missing out. Yet after welcoming our new crop of students, I've quickly come to realize that this is more of an advanced program for startup founders who are already all in on their tech company. Therefore, it may have been too much too soon for someone still making that transition. In short, thanks for seeing what I couldn't and for saving yourself from unnecessary overwhelm. So here we're validating and confirming their decision not to act. Once again, making it an empowered decision they made, not just something they let slide. One is far more empowering than the other. And while I'll admit that I am pumped to be bringing a new group of super different entrepreneurs along for that ride, I haven't forgotten about your journey. Either not at the slightest. In fact, I spent most of the weekend wrapping my head around the ways I can continue to spur your growth and bring you closer to starting your company in a powerful and sane way, a way that rewards your unwavering intent to start an exciting and disruptive tech company without disrupting your current day to day life in any kind of crazy unsustainable way. Then it hit me. I just released the first module of ID to exit. It's called the Founders Foundation and it's been a massive hit inside the community. And then we get into the benefits of it and what's included. In short, preparing you to become the type of business leader that can start scale and ultimately sell your company. So it's a much more accessible version of the main product that meets them where they're at. No surprise that it's hitting a major chord with the idea to exit community so much so that I've had a few members tell me that this module alone is worth the $2,000 price I get the course. So a little price anchor there. But today I want to give you a chance to get access to module one at a ridiculously small fraction of the full idea to exit enrollment fee. So we're anchoring it against the cost of the full program that they've been evaluating for the last few days. So the number of the dollar value of the full program is what is weighing heavy in their mind already. And that's why we choose that as what we want to anchor it against. There are two main reasons I'm doing this to thank you for sticking with me throughout the idea to exit launch period. I know it's quite the fixture in your inbox. Selfishly speaking, I know. And many have confirmed that what you'll learn in this module will set you up to rise up to a whole new level as an entrepreneur. And from that place, I know you'll be in an even better position to take advantage of and profit from the full course when it eventually relaunch. So this is just some transparency to build trust, show we're really on their side. Here's what I'm prepared to do. Special one time offer. You can get access to module one for a single investment of $197. So here's the offer. Here's what's included. A little bonus called Q&A. And then we close it with, yeah. And until today, only way you could get access was through the full idea tags that add a rate of 2000. So once again, showing how exclusive this is and how people paid $2,000 to get access to it, anchor it to the $197. And that's it. Close with the guarantee. And really, this has all the elements we spoke about before. So if you do want to include a downsell, that is more of a splintered version of the main program, a lighter version of it, that really meets your non buyers where they're at and empowers them to maybe get in the full program later. That is an example you might want to follow. So the next one is from Todd Herman's 90 day year, which was a really big launch that was running from, I think, 2016-ish to 2019. Had a few really, really big successful launches. And this was the downsell that ran after, I think, just about every launch. So, so yeah, for context, it was a really extensive pre launch with, you know, really valuable videos that Todd was sharing. It's a great information that really queued up the relational imbalance that we spoke about in the last video. And this really gave them a chance to hop on board in a way that empowered that they were uniquely exclusively empowered, sorry, exclusively empowered to enjoy based on how independent and self driven they are. So this is how you leverage positive traits and show how a lower ticket program could actually be better for them. So second, second chance 90 day year back, 90 day years back, but not for everyone. I've decided to temporarily reopen the doors on a very special edition of the 90 day year. It's a different version than the one you just missed out on. So once again, highlighting the fact that they just missed out on the offer. More on that in a sec. Accordingly, it'll come at a brand new price point. You may be pleasantly surprised and it'll only be available to you until date. So yeah, so just pay attention to the language in here. You know, we're saying that it's a special edition of it. We're not making it feel lower class in any way. In fact, we're actually putting it up on a pedestal, even though it is a lower ticket program. So we set the expectation right at the beginning that maybe this is actually more expensive and then we create the open loop that they might actually be surprised at the price point. So just some advanced techniques layered in there. Yeah. And then we open up with some urgency right off the bat, actually saying the exact date that it's going to be closing. Now, before I get into the details of what you'll be getting with this edition, I'm going to address the elephant in the room. Many of you reading this will ask, why is Todd doing this? What's his motivation? So let's nip it. I'm temporarily reopening the playbook edition of the 90 day year, not because I have had to respond to dozens of emails and messages from entrepreneurs who missed the deadline and insisted on a second chance, not because I want to pad the stats with a few extra sales and definitely not because I enjoy twisting your arm, not my style. So we're really countering a lot of the objections that a very attuned and marketing savvy crowd would have or coming right out of the bat and saying, nope, that's not our motivation in doing this. I'm going out of my way to reopen the 90 day year for three more days for one specific reason to reward a very special breed of entrepreneur. Maybe that's you. Maybe it's not. How do we know? Ask yourself a question. Do you share similar qualities with the Olympian? Let me elaborate in 18 years of working at the pinnacle of the performance field. I've had a chance to work with over 16,000 athletes. It's no small number. And with that level of experience comes some insight, most notably not all athletes are created equal. And while I have bottomless amounts of respect for every athlete at every level of competition, there's a certain type that really inspires me, the Olympian, because he shows up every damn day except for one month. Every four years, the Olympian remains in the shadows, making ends meet, training day and nights, building blood, sweat, tears in the name of a single goal. Unlike the big sport athlete, the cash is to know is there and won't be there unless they put the type of performance that catapults them to the very top of their field. They wake up every day with the determination to do the work steadfast and self-reliant. So we're really creating the comparison of all these amazing qualities between the Olympian and our reader. Any laps and focus spells spell certain failure and some sports, even death, they spend more time and flow in a single month and many of us will spend an entire lifetime and in a blink of an eye or even 10 seconds, it's all over. No medal given for potential, only performance. And if you're in an individual sport, then there's no team to shelter your personal performance. It's all you. And I believe the concept of the Olympian can be transferred to the entrepreneurial world, a self-starter who doesn't need someone to drag them out of bed to do the hard work. They enjoy the hustle. All they need is the playbook, the plan, the strategies and systems that when diligently executed will make them grow into the world champion performer they have lurking inside. That's why I created the playbook for the ambitious self-reliant entrepreneur who's ready to execute things on his or her own. For this special breed of entrepreneur, I stripped away everything else from the program. So once again, we're not saying that this is a lower class and that they're getting something less because they're painless. We're saying they are a special breed and they are getting just the playbook without these extra distractions. So this is the same product that could have been guilt-tripped and saying, you know, you don't get any of these things. We're withholding them because you're a lower quality customer or your second class or third class. We're saying you're not getting these because you're actually a special breed and we've qualified why they are. Just do you approve and game plan on your inner drive to execute it. Warning, this edition comes at a significantly lower cost than the regular 90 day year, but it would be a critical mistake for you to see that as a discount or a way to get in cheaper. It's just another way for you to reap the rewards without the larger investment. Will you join me? So once again, this disclaimer is important for proving that we mean all of this. We mean that this is for someone who actually is self-driven and self-motivated and can function just as well, if not better without the extra frills. So this is my favorite down sell that I've ever been a part of, performed exceptionally well and one that I really encourage you to see if you have lurking within your product. Is there a stripped down version of it, one without some of the extras that the main product might have that would be more applicable or even more useful and valuable for someone who is self-driven, self-reliant or embodies some of these higher qualities. So that's it. These are the examples. This is the DMV down sell. If you currently have a launcher and evergreen final without a down sell, adding one of these is pretty much the easiest way to add extra revenue while bringing extra value to the lives of your prospects. So hopefully you give that a shot and I'll catch you in the next video for the final installment of Six Figure Emails. See you there.
